original_snippet_context: Discussion about the "lei de conversão" of 1899 and its impact on the value of the currency.
relevant_quote: Se a republica tem interesse em desmerecer o seu próprio bilhete, é preciso examinar a natureza desse interesse.
justification: The article discusses the implications of the 1899 conversion law and its effects on the national currency, posing questions about the government's role, without explicitly advocating for either the orthodox or expansionist view.
